title: emporos #1713
definition:
1) one on a journey, whether by sea or by land, esp. for trade
 2) a merchant as opposed to a retailer or petty tradesman
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) one on a journey, whether by sea or by land, esp. for trade
 2) a merchant as opposed to a retailer or petty tradesman

    NASB:  a passenger on shipboard, a merchant:
